response.justification: While the candidate brings 30+ years of software development experience and some C/Linux background, they lack native-level Japanese proficiency (a stated required qualification) and have no demonstrated expertise in security technologies, embedded networking, or network switch operation. Recent career focuses on web/full-stack TypeScript development rather than embedded C firmware, and there's no evidence of Linux kernel investigation capability or modifications.
strengths: Extensive software development career (30+ years) demonstrating ability to learn multiple languages and technologies
Some C/C++ and Linux experience from earlier roles at National Instruments and Altom Consulting
Fluent English communication and proven ability to work internationally
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency mentioned despite being an explicit required qualification
Recent 15+ years focused on web/full-stack TypeScript and Node.js; minimal recent embedded C or firmware development
No demonstrated expertise in required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection) or networking fundamentals (Layer-2/3, SNMP, NETCONF, switch operation)

key_factors.factor: No security or embedded networking background
Extensive general software development track record
